info.name: Custom Embroidered Canvas Tote Bag, Bridesmaid Gifts, Beach Handbags, Custom Text Tote, Bachelorette Gifts, School Bag, Gift for Her

description:
Introducing the Custom Travel Tote Bag – where timeless vintage style meets everyday practicality. Made from durable high-quality canvas, this spacious tote is designed to be your perfect companion for all occasions.

✨ Why You’ll Love This Tote:
• Personalized & Unique – Add custom embroidered text to create a one-of-a-kind bag, perfect as a thoughtful gift for her.
• Versatile & Spacious – Ideal for school, office, grocery shopping, beach trips, park outings, trade shows, and daily adventures.
• Built to Last – Crafted from sturdy canvas with elegant embroidery that adds a touch of nostalgia and sophistication.
• Large Capacity – Ample room for everything you need, plus a handy front pocket for small essentials.

📐 Size Details:
• Main Bag: 15"W x 11.5"H x 5.5"D
• Front Pocket: 5.5"W

🔤 Customization Instructions for Font 10:
• This font style requires two colors.
• Please specify them in order as “Color 1” and “Color 2”.
• Example: Color 1: Blue, Color 2: Gold

🧼 Care Instructions:
Gently hand wash with a damp cloth and hang dry to preserve the embroidery and material.

🎁 Perfect For:
• Custom gifts for women, moms, friends, or colleagues
• A personalized beach bag, market tote, or work bag
• Unique promotional items for events and trade shows
• Anyone who values style, function, and sentimental touches

This tote isn’t just a bag – it’s a statement. Make it yours today!

reviews.content: Perfect color, as described would buy again.
There was a small issue on the font but Fei was very responsive and easy to liaise with and is arranging a re-shipment.

Listing review by Marissa I placed my order for a bachelorette trip on feb 3rd and was notified that I can expect it to be delivered by feb 10-13. i reached out to the seller on feb 14th that my order still hasn’t shipped per the tracking number status. After I sent my message asking about the order status I received notice my order shipped on feb 14th, but did not receive a response from the seller. The seller only responded to me after it was delivered, on feb 17th, and only acknowledged it was delivered not that the order was a week late and did not address my questions. I am disappointed about the sellers communication but the bags are definitely nice and high quality.
Excellent customer service, item arrived earlier than expected
